title: Find A Tote By Entering A Location Number Or Container Number
summary: Use the Container Selection screen to locate a tote in the system by entering a location number or tote/container number, then identify the rack or AGV where it is located if the system returns a result.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when you need to locate a tote/container in OptiSweep using a known location number or tote/container number and determine the associated rack or AGV location shown by the Container Selection screen.
not_for: Do not use this runbook for tote recovery or reinitialization steps; the source does not provide those actions here.
Do not use this runbook to remove AGVs or perform other control actions in the interface; the packet includes cautionary source context but not an approved procedure for those actions.
Do not use this runbook when you do not have a known location number or tote/container number to enter.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Open or view the Container Selection screen, enter the known location number or tote/container number, and review the returned rack or AGV location if the tote is in the system.

safety_notes: This source supports a lookup/view procedure only.
The source does not provide recovery actions if the tote is not found in the system.
Related training context warns against using this interface for removal actions on an active system; this runbook is limited to locating a tote.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Container Selection screen
Known location number or tote/container number

access_required: Access to the Container Selection screen
system_preconditions: A location number or tote/container number is available for entry.
The tote must be in the system for a rack or AGV location to be returned.

visual_references.description: Container Selection screen showing tote/container lookup and location indication behavior.

steps.title: Open or view the Container Selection screen
steps.purpose: Access the screen used for tote/container lookup and location review.
steps.instruction: Open or view the Container Selection screen for totes or containers before starting the lookup.
steps.expected_result: The Container Selection screen is visible and ready for lookup activity.
steps.healthy_condition: The Container Selection screen is displayed and shows the tote/container selection view.
steps.failure_condition: The Container Selection screen is not available or cannot be viewed.

actions.label: Open Container Selection
actions.exact_action: Open or view the Container Selection screen for totes or containers.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Container Selection screen and the search/entry area used for location number or tote/container number lookup.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the Container Selection screen cannot be accessed.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR shows 'Container Selection' and describes selecting a location to show a box icon and tote number, with rack or AGV location information.
Training slide frame showing the OptiSweep container selection view and how tote presence and location are indicated.

steps.title: Enter the location number or tote/container number
steps.purpose: Provide the identifier needed for the system to locate the tote.
steps.instruction: Type the known location number or tote/container number into the available entry field on the Container Selection screen.
steps.expected_result: The entered number is accepted in the lookup field.
steps.healthy_condition: The location number or tote/container number is entered into the screen field used for lookup.
steps.failure_condition: The number cannot be entered or the correct entry field is unclear from the interface.

actions.label: Enter lookup number
actions.exact_action: Type the location number or tote/container number into the available entry field.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Container Selection screen area used to enter a location number or tote/container number.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the interface does not present a usable entry field.
Stop or escalate if the field label or exact entry location is unclear and additional guidance is needed.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR states: 'You can also find a tote by typing the location number in ...' and references tote number entry.

steps.title: Review whether the tote is returned by the system
steps.purpose: Determine whether the entered number corresponds to a tote currently in the system.
steps.instruction: Review the returned result after entry to determine whether the tote is in the system.
steps.expected_result: A result indicates whether the tote is present in the system.
steps.healthy_condition: The system returns a usable result showing the tote can be located.
steps.failure_condition: No usable result is returned, or the tote is not in the system.

actions.label: Review lookup result
actions.exact_action: Review the returned result to identify whether the tote is in the system.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Returned lookup information indicating tote presence and associated location context.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the tote is not in the system.
Stop or escalate if the entered number does not return a usable result.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR states the tote can be found by entering the number and selecting the rack or AGV where it is located 'if it's in the system.'

steps.title: Select the returned rack or AGV
steps.purpose: Open the location associated with the returned tote result.
steps.instruction: Select the rack or AGV associated with the returned result.
steps.expected_result: The selected rack or AGV is highlighted or displayed as the tote location.
steps.healthy_condition: The system shows the rack or AGV associated with the searched tote.
steps.failure_condition: The rack or AGV cannot be selected or the result does not identify a clear location.

actions.label: Select rack or AGV
actions.exact_action: Select the rack or AGV associated with the returned result.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The rack or AGV location associated with the searched tote on the Container Selection screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the returned result does not identify a selectable rack or AGV.
Stop or escalate if selecting the result does not show a usable location.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR states: 'You can also find a tote by typing the location number in and selecting the rack or AGV it's located on if it's in the system.'

steps.title: Confirm the displayed tote location
steps.purpose: Verify the final rack or AGV location shown for the tote.
steps.instruction: Confirm the displayed rack or AGV location for the tote.
steps.expected_result: The tote location is identified as a rack or AGV shown by the system.
steps.healthy_condition: A clear rack or AGV location is displayed for the searched tote.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed location is missing, unclear, or not usable for the operator's need.

actions.label: Confirm displayed location
actions.exact_action: Confirm the displayed rack or AGV location for the tote.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The displayed rack or AGV location associated with the searched tote.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the displayed rack or AGV location is not usable.
Escalate if the entered number does not return a usable rack or AGV location and additional guidance is needed.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The source describes identifying the rack or AGV where the tote is located after entering a location number or tote/container number.
Selecting a location shows a box icon and the tote number; the slide describes finding a tote by typing a location or container number and selecting the rack or AGV where it is located.

success_criteria: The operator enters a known location number or tote/container number on the Container Selection screen.
The system returns a result indicating the tote is in the system.
The associated rack or AGV location can be selected and confirmed.
healthy_conditions: The Container Selection screen is available.
The entered location number or tote/container number returns a result.
A clear rack or AGV location is displayed for the tote.
failure_conditions: The Container Selection screen cannot be accessed.
The entry field or exact field label is unclear from the source.
The tote is not in the system.
The entered number does not return a usable rack or AGV location.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the tote is not in the system, because the source does not provide further recovery steps.
Escalate if the entered number does not return a usable rack or AGV location and additional guidance is needed.
Escalate if the interface does not clearly support the lookup as shown in the training source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Container Selection screen showing lookup by location number or tote/container number and the resulting rack or AGV location.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: OCR states: 'You can also find a tote by typing the location number in and selecting the rack or AGV it's located on if it's in the system,' and references tote number entry.

missing_details: The source does not clearly identify the exact field label used for location number or tote/container number entry.
The source does not provide explicit navigation steps to reach the Container Selection screen.
The source does not provide recovery steps when the tote is not found in the system.
The source does not provide a time estimate for completing the lookup.
